{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor’s Stage
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]’s Stage is a three-story structure situated at the entrance to the [[Imperial Palace]], positioned behind the main [[gate]]. It features a wide balcony that overlooks a massive courtyard capable of accommodating ten thousand people, serving as a location from which [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] or his representatives can speak to the citizens of the [[Capital]]. While it is used for public addresses, particularly during times of crisis, the building was not constructed as a military fortification. The layout includes a costume changing room located one floor below and behind the balcony, and for maintenance purposes, the public sections of the building are accessible via a single master key. The site has served as a focal point during significant conflicts, including a moment when the [[Imperial Guard]] surrendered and gathered beneath it following a destructive attack on its walls.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor’s Stage]] is a balcony overlooking a huge courtyard.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor’s Stage]] is a three-story building at the entrance to the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Emperor’s Stage]] contains a costume changing room behind the balcony.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Emperor’s Stage]] was not designed as a fortified location.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Emperor’s Stage]] is a location where [[Jorin]] arrived.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
